overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing first-person vehicle driving through Night City. The player drives along a multi-lane highway beneath overpasses, loses control and crashes into a concrete barrier, slides along the wall, then drives up a grassy embankment leaving the road. The scene features futuristic industrial architecture, billboards, and the distinctive yellow NC tower.

events.description: vehicle passes under the overpass bridge
white sedan passes by on the left lane

agents.ego_description: driving straight along the highway at moderate speed, approaching and passing under the overpass

notable_agents.action: white sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning across the road
large advertisement billboard with 'El Gaucho' text
billboard with 'Smoothie Desire' text and graphics
tall distinctive yellow building with NC logo, iconic Night City landmark
red and white striped concrete divider barrier along the right side
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a clear view of a multi-lane highway in a futuristic city. The camera drives straight toward and under a large concrete overpass. Billboards line the right side including 'El Gaucho' and 'Smoothie Desire' advertisements, while the distinctive yellow NC tower rises in the distance. A white sedan overtakes on the left as the vehicle maintains a steady speed.

events.description: vehicle makes sharp right turn and collides with concrete barrier
silver van passes extremely close on the right, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: losing control and turning sharply right, colliding with the concrete barrier and sliding along it

notable_agents.action: silver van passing very closely on the right side immediately after collision

segments.scene_description: The vehicle suddenly turns sharply right and collides with the concrete barrier, beginning to slide along it. A silver van passes extremely close on the right, momentarily obscuring the view. The overpass disappears behind as the camera focuses on the barrier wall and the yellow NC tower which is now closer on the right.

events.description: entering shadow beneath the overpass structure, lighting becomes darker
passing green industrial warehouse complex on the left

agents.ego_description: sliding and driving along the concrete barrier wall under the shadow of the overpass

notable_agents.action: black car driving ahead in the distance on the main road

entered.detail: large green industrial warehouse with white logo signage
tall cylindrical water tower with green top visible above buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues sliding along the concrete barrier beneath the overpass, entering a shadowed area with diffused lighting. A large green industrial complex appears on the left, and a water tower becomes visible in the distance ahead. The earlier billboards disappear behind as the camera moves forward under the bridge structure.

events.description: emerging from underpass shadow back into direct sunlight
continuing along the curved road following the barrier

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved road following the concrete barrier, having emerged from the underpass

entered.detail: tall structure with multiple digital advertisement screens
sloped embankment with dry yellow grass rising beside the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the shadow of the overpass back into bright sunlight, continuing along a curved section of highway. A tall digital billboard structure stands ahead, and a dry grassy embankment rises on the right side. The industrial buildings and overpass recede behind as the camera follows the curve of the road.

events.description: vehicle leaves asphalt road and drives up grassy embankment
ascending the hill, slowing down on uneven terrain

agents.ego_description: driving up the grassy embankment away from the road, climbing the hillside

entered.detail: dry yellow grass and dirt terrain covering the hillside
scattered palm trees on the hillside
distant futuristic city skyline with various buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle leaves the asphalt road and drives up a grassy embankment, transitioning to off-road terrain. The concrete barrier and billboards fall behind as the camera ascends the dry grassy hillside. Palm trees appear on the slope, and the yellow NC tower is now visible straight ahead in the distance, with the broader city skyline coming into view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a vehicle that transitions from a high-speed highway drive into a chaotic crash and an eventual ascent up a grassy hillside. It begins by driving straight under a concrete overpass toward the distant yellow NC tower, passing billboards and a white sedan. As the vehicle suddenly swerves and collides with a concrete barrier, the camera slides along the wall while a silver van flashes past, shifting the focus toward the approaching tower. The scene then moves through a shadowed area beneath the bridge structure, passing a green industrial complex and a water tower before emerging back into bright sunlight along a curved section of the road. Finally, the vehicle leaves the asphalt entirely to drive up a dry, palm-dotted embankment, leaving the highway behind as the broader city skyline and the NC tower open up in the distance.
